description: Describes what should be looked for on the operating system.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

aliases.description: The various names to look for when looking up the probe type.
aliases.title: aliases

associatedAppName.description: The name of the application associated with this probe.
associatedAppName.title: associatedAppName

description.description: A brief description about the OS probe and its purpose.
description.title: description

fileContentMatch.description: If defined, and the probe matches a file, will run a regexp on the content to find a match.
fileContentMatch.title: fileContentMatch

importHash.description: The hash of the structure used to compare with new import version.
importHash.title: importHash

importLabel.description: The user-defined import label that allows the system to group resources from the same import operation.
importLabel.title: importLabel

name.description: The name of the OS probe.
name.title: name

paths.description: The location(s) where the probe should look. Supports the following generics: - prefix `~` to denote user path. - `*` to denotes crawling siblings for files/folders.
paths.title: paths

propagate.description: Propagates the object to all child namespaces. This is always true.
propagate.title: propagate

updateTime.description: Last update date of the object.
updateTime.title: updateTime

title: OSProbe
